page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance provides 64 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, resulting in 64 vCPUs. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, which yields a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, making it suitable for memory-intensive operations.

For storage and networking, the server includes a bundled 3839 GB local SSD, enabling high-speed data access directly on the host. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The instance does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, and it runs on the KVM hypervisor.

This hardware profile offers high resource density, combining dedicated compute resources with a large memory footprint and substantial local storage. The server is designed for workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory caching, data warehousing, and enterprise applications that require consistent performance and low-latency storage access.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.16xlarge is a memory-optimized and storage-focused server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. This KVM-hypervised instance features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, delivering 64 vCPUs. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage is supported by a bundled 3839 GB SSD, and network connectivity is anchored by a 32 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The server does not include integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration provides high resource density, making it highly suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, data warehousing, and intensive enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity and fast local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, 3839 GB of local SSD storage, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth for database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, 3839 GB local SSD, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core server with half a terabyte of memory and high-capacity local SSD storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.7 GHz
512 GB of system memory providing 8 GB per core
3839 GB of high-speed local SSD storage
Optimized for large-scale databases and in-memory caching
